model_specification_line: fit = smf.wls("full_time ~ eligible + eligible:post + C(year) + C(statefip) + C(birthyr)", data=model_df, weights=model_df["perwt"]).fit(cov_type="cluster", cov_kwds={"groups": model_df["statefip"]})
sample_selection: statefip <= 56 (50 states + DC; exclude Puerto Rico and other non-state codes)
